lore.block.aether_beyond_parity.ambrosiu: Crafting an Ambrosium Shard with logs and sticks makes this comforting Campfire, perfect for indoors and outdoors alike. It can even be used to cook food!
This decorative light made by slotting an Ambrosium Torch in a Zanite cage can be placed on the floor or hung from ceilings or chains.
lore.block.aether_beyond_parity.black_sk: Crafted with Black Wool and Skyroot Planks. You can only sleep at night to skip nighttime, but during the day you can set your respawn point in the Aether. You cannot sleep while monsters are nearby.
lore.block.aether_beyond_parity.blue_sky: Crafted with Blue Wool and Skyroot Planks. You can only sleep at night to skip nighttime, but during the day you can set your respawn point in the Aether. You cannot sleep while monsters are nearby.
lore.block.aether_beyond_parity.brown_sk: Crafted with Brown Wool and Skyroot Planks. You can only sleep at night to skip nighttime, but during the day you can set your respawn point in the Aether. You cannot sleep while monsters are nearby.
lore.block.aether_beyond_parity.chiseled: A decorative variant of Holystone Bricks. A cloud symbol is carved into every face of this block.
lore.block.aether_beyond_parity.cyan_sky: Crafted with Cyan Wool and Skyroot Planks. You can only sleep at night to skip nighttime, but during the day you can set your respawn point in the Aether. You cannot sleep while monsters are nearby.
lore.block.aether_beyond_parity.enchante: A Grass Block that has been enchanted to allow for increasing harvest rates of Blue Berries.
lore.block.aether_beyond_parity.golden_o: Crafted from Golden Oak Logs. Can be used for decorative enclosures and defenses. Great for keeping nasty intruders away!
Crafted from Golden Oak Wood. Can be used for decorative enclosures and defenses. Great for keeping nasty intruders away!
lore.block.aether_beyond_parity.gray_sky: Crafted with Gray Wool and Skyroot Planks. You can only sleep at night to skip nighttime, but during the day you can set your respawn point in the Aether. You cannot sleep while monsters are nearby.
lore.block.aether_beyond_parity.green_sk: Crafted with Green Wool and Skyroot Planks. You can only sleep at night to skip nighttime, but during the day you can set your respawn point in the Aether. You cannot sleep while monsters are nearby.
lore.block.aether_beyond_parity.holyston: A furnace constructed from Holystone. This can be used to cook both ores and food while surviving in the Aether.
A decorative variant of Holystone Bricks that can be oriented directionally. The top has rounded carvings resembling a Valkyrie.
A decorative variant of Holystone Bricks that can be oriented directionally. This block can work for adding variation and accenting among other bricks.
A decorative variant of Holystone Bricks that can be oriented directionally. Useful for bases or arches in your builds.
These levers, made with materials native to the Aether, are useful for toggling Redstone power on-demand.
lore.block.aether_beyond_parity.light_bl: Crafted with Light Blue Wool and Skyroot Planks. You can only sleep at night to skip nighttime, but during the day you can set your respawn point in the Aether. You cannot sleep while monsters are nearby.
lore.block.aether_beyond_parity.light_gr: Crafted with Light Gray Wool and Skyroot Planks. You can only sleep at night to skip nighttime, but during the day you can set your respawn point in the Aether. You cannot sleep while monsters are nearby.
lore.block.aether_beyond_parity.lime_sky: Crafted with Lime Wool and Skyroot Planks. You can only sleep at night to skip nighttime, but during the day you can set your respawn point in the Aether. You cannot sleep while monsters are nearby.
lore.block.aether_beyond_parity.magenta_: Crafted with Magenta Wool and Skyroot Planks. You can only sleep at night to skip nighttime, but during the day you can set your respawn point in the Aether. You cannot sleep while monsters are nearby.
lore.block.aether_beyond_parity.orange_s: Crafted with Orange Wool and Skyroot Planks. You can only sleep at night to skip nighttime, but during the day you can set your respawn point in the Aether. You cannot sleep while monsters are nearby.
lore.block.aether_beyond_parity.pink_sky: Crafted with Pink Wool and Skyroot Planks. You can only sleep at night to skip nighttime, but during the day you can set your respawn point in the Aether. You cannot sleep while monsters are nearby.
lore.block.aether_beyond_parity.polished: This Holystone has been polished to a shine, making for a pleasant flooring option.
Crafted from Polished Holystone. Slabs are half blocks, versatile for decoration and smooth slopes. Try adding some to a building's roofing!
Crafted from Polished Holystone. Stairs are useful for adding verticality to builds and are often used for decoration too!
Crafted from Polished Holystone. Can be used for decorative enclosures and defenses. Great for keeping nasty intruders away!
lore.block.aether_beyond_parity.purple_s: Crafted with Purple Wool and Skyroot Planks. You can only sleep at night to skip nighttime, but during the day you can set your respawn point in the Aether. You cannot sleep while monsters are nearby.
lore.block.aether_beyond_parity.red_skyr: Crafted with Red Wool and Skyroot Planks. You can only sleep at night to skip nighttime, but during the day you can set your respawn point in the Aether. You cannot sleep while monsters are nearby.
lore.block.aether_beyond_parity.skyroot_: A Skyroot container that can be used to store all the goods you collect on your adventures.
It may look like a normal Skyroot Chest, but it really isn't. As soon as you right-click on it, a Chest Mimic will pop out! These appear in Bronze and Silver Dungeons.
A workbench made of Skyroot, capable of crafting anything you might need.
A Skyroot Ladder. Handy for vertical travel.
Crafted from Skyroot Logs. Can be used for decorative enclosures and defenses. Great for keeping nasty intruders away!
Crafted from Skyroot Wood. Can be used for decorative enclosures and defenses. Great for keeping nasty intruders away!
lore.block.aether_beyond_parity.stripped: Crafted from Stripped Skyroot Logs. Can be used for decorative enclosures and defenses. Great for keeping nasty intruders away!
Crafted from Stripped Skyroot Wood. Can be used for decorative enclosures and defenses. Great for keeping nasty intruders away!
lore.block.aether_beyond_parity.white_sk: Crafted with White Wool and Skyroot Planks. You can only sleep at night to skip nighttime, but during the day you can set your respawn point in the Aether. You cannot sleep while monsters are nearby.
lore.block.aether_beyond_parity.yellow_s: Crafted with Yellow Wool and Skyroot Planks. You can only sleep at night to skip nighttime, but during the day you can set your respawn point in the Aether. You cannot sleep while monsters are nearby.
lore.block.aether_beyond_parity.zanite_b: Crafted from Zanite Gemstones, these robust bars are both ornate and intimidating, keeping even the most dangerous enemies out—or in.
lore.block.aether_beyond_parity.zanite_c: A royal chain fashioned from Zanite Gemstones. It makes for an elegant decoration and a seamless place to hang Ambrosium Lanterns.
lore.block.aether_beyond_parity.zanite_d: Crafted from Zanite Gemstones. This intricate door, which can only be opened by Redstone, helps keep your buildings safe, even from other players.
lore.block.aether_beyond_parity.zanite_p: Crafted from Zanite Gemstones, this pressure plate can only be activated by Players.
lore.block.aether_beyond_parity.zanite_t: Crafted from Zanite Gemstones. This trapdoor, which can only be opened by Redstone, is a surefire way to protect your mines from any unwanted intruders, even other players.
lore.item.aether_beyond_parity.golden_sw: A gooey orb that is dropped from Golden Swets. It can be used to fertilize soil. Another use is to put it alongside String to make a Lead.
pack.aether_beyond_parity.classic.descri: The classic feeling of Beyond Parity
pack.aether_beyond_parity.classic.title: Beyond Parity Classic
